title: VanillaPvP
description: Increase the visibility of what’s important in PvP & Vanilla SMP with an all encompassing design.
body:
## VanillaPvP: See what's important!
**CREDIT/CONTRIBUTORS:** 
- Several assets from the "gui" folder were made by [xSpinHDx](https://modrinth.com/user/xSpinHDx) & they're licensed under CC-BY-SA 4.0!
- Several shaders from [AlphaLeoli](https://modrinth.com/user/AlphaLeoli) were used & modified. They're licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0!
- The GUI/In-hand skeleton was created by [HerobaneNair](https://modrinth.com/user/herobane), He also helped in modifying shaders.
# What?
**PLEASE USE [Polytone(for brightness)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) & [EMF(for smaller crystals 1.21.4-1.21.8 versions only)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)**

VanillaPvP is a resource pack I've been developing for 3.5 years for 2 main reasons
- Better visibility, less ambiguity.
- Sensory Processing Disorder(SPD).

Here's just a few of the features:

- Brightness
- NO Explosions
- Translucent Particles
- Translucent & Small Totem Pop
- Highlighted Totems
- NO Smoke
- **AND MANY MANY MORE**
## Why?
*SPD* is a disorder that allows my senses to be overstimulated easily. With this in mind I created this pack predominantly for pvp(evidently by the `pack.png`) but after playing more survival I began to notice just how much of Minecraft is ambiguous, cluttered or outright overstimulating. This pack is intended to be a lightweight all-in-one daily driver well still allowing you to use all your other favorite packs with compatibility across versions so instead of having to download a multitude of tweaks, you can just invest in this shampoo right here!

If you find something broken, or have any suggestions, please [contact me](https://discord.gg/ba7uHC5hwg) or leave an issue in the github.

This video is of an earlier version of the resource packs there are *subtle* differences now!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LBsHosvvoJc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Known Issues
- **Longer load times**
- **Outdated showcase, gallery, & Github**
